text: PDQ® Cancer Information for Health Professionals The PDQ health professional cancer information summaries are part of the comprehensive, evidence-based, up-to-date cancer content made available as a public service of the NCI.

They are intended to improve the overall quality of cancer care by informing and educating health professionals about the current published evidence related to individual cancer-related topics and support informed decision making between clinicians and patients. Selected PDQ cancer information is translated into Spanish, Japanese, and Chinese by NCI and trusted content partners.

Learn more about Find evidence-based information on hundreds of cancer topics. Our Editorial Boards represent a wide range of cancer disciplines and institutions and are editorially independent of NCI. Our Editorial Process ensures timely updates that reflect the strongest evidence. Our Evidence Assessment process ensures that our cancer information summaries enable informed decision-making.

Cancer Information Summaries in Other Languages Selected PDQ® cancer content is available in Spanish, Chinese, and Japanese. PDQ has many content partners in the U. S. and around the world that include academic and research institutions, nonprofit institutions, and commercial web and print publishers.
